arguments.final_answer: Implemented BitSet with TDD. Uses Vec<u64> words for compact bit storage. set/clear/test use word index (bit/64) and offset (bit%64). union/intersection operate word-by-word with |/&. count uses count_ones(). 6 tests pass.
